name: keiryu
description: A dark color theme inspired by mountain streams

scripts.debug: npm run build && npx vsce package && code --install-extension keiryu-0.1.0.vsix --force
scripts.debug:vsix: npm run build && npx vsce package && code --install-extension keiryu-$npm_package_version.vsix --force
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npx vsce package && npx vsce publish
